name: MBA, Corporate Leadership Track
headline: Advance into senior management with an employer-sponsored MBA built for working professionals.
description: This AACSB-aligned MBA is designed for mid-career professionals moving into senior leadership. Coursework pairs strategy, finance, and people management with a capstone consulting project. Built in partnership with corporate education sponsors so eligible employees can complete the degree with little or no out-of-pocket cost.

discount.terms: Full tuition coverage applies only to employees of organizations with an active corporate education benefit and is subject to the sponsor's policy. Coverage estimates assume continuous enrollment and standard credit load. Confirm eligibility with your employer's benefits administrator. AllCampus is not a financial aid office and does not guarantee coverage.

admissionRequirements: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution
Two years of professional work experience
Current resume and a short statement of goals
benefits: Full tuition coverage for eligible sponsored employees
Capstone consulting project with a real organization

name: Pre-Health Professions Certificate
headline: Complete the prerequisites for nursing and allied-health graduate programs in under a year.
description: Being a nurse is consistently rated among the most rewarding careers. This online certificate covers the prerequisite courses needed to apply to a nursing or allied-health graduate program, with tuition capped so the cost stays predictable regardless of how many courses you take.

discount.terms: The capped tuition amount applies to the standard course sequence completed within the published timeframe. Additional or repeated courses may incur added cost. Confirm current pricing with the university. AllCampus is not a financial aid office.

admissionRequirements: Submit an official high-school or college transcript
Submit a 250-word minimum purpose statement describing your goals

name: Healthcare Administration, Associate
headline: Get educated to serve in an in-demand field of healthcare administration in as little as two years.
description: The Associate of Science in Healthcare Administration degree is a 60-credit associate program for a career in healthcare administration. This online degree-completion program provides fundamental knowledge and skills in a healthcare-administration context.

discount.terms: Discounts are available to new students only. To understand how tuition reimbursement and transfer credits may impact your total cost, connect with an AllCampus Education Benefits Specialist. AllCampus is not a financial aid office.

admissionRequirements: Completion of a high-school diploma or equivalent
Meet and interview with a Nursing University admissions advisor

name: BA English in Literature
headline: Analyze a wide range of literature to help advance your career with a BA in English with a concentration in Literature.
description: This concentration is designed for those interested in literary study, as well as those planning to pursue an MA in English. In this concentration, you'll immerse yourself and become well-versed in literature from multiple time periods and genres.

discount.terms: Low tuition reflects the per-credit rate before any applicable fees. Confirm current pricing and fees with the university. AllCampus is not a financial aid office.

admissionRequirements: Complete an admissions form, no application fee
Submit official transcripts from prior schools

name: BS Supply Chain Management
headline: Build the logistics and operations skills employers are hiring for, and defer payment while you study.
description: This online Bachelor of Science in Supply Chain Management prepares you for roles in logistics, procurement, and operations. Coursework blends analytics with hands-on case studies, and a deferred-payment option lets you start now and pay over time.
benefits: Deferred-payment option, start now and pay over time

name: BS Computer Science
headline: Build job-ready software engineering skills with a hands-on, online Computer Science degree.
description: This Bachelor of Science in Computer Science covers programming, data structures, algorithms, and systems design. Project-based coursework builds a portfolio you can show employers.

discount.terms: Standard tuition applies. Confirm current pricing with the institution.

name: Project Management Certificate
headline: Earn a PMI-aligned project management credential with a single, flat program fee.
description: This online certificate prepares you to lead projects across industries and to sit for the PMP exam. It is priced as one flat program fee paid at enrollment, with no per-credit billing, so you know the full cost up front.

discount.terms: The flat program fee is paid in full at enrollment and covers the standard course sequence. Confirm current pricing with the institution. AllCampus is not a financial aid office.

benefits: Prepares you for the PMP exam

name: Data Analytics Certificate
headline: Build job-ready analytics skills in a credit-bearing certificate billed per credit.
description: This credit-bearing certificate covers the data analysis, visualization, and SQL skills employers hire for. Courses are billed per credit, so you can enroll one course at a time and pay as you go rather than all at once.

discount.terms: Credit-bearing certificate billed per credit; payment is not required up front for the full program. Discounts are available to new students only. Confirm current pricing with the institution. AllCampus is not a financial aid office.

benefits: Pay per course as you go
